summary: A2A transport binding tested against A2A v1.0.0 specification examples (Strategy B). Data model updated to match v1.0: flat Part (no kind discriminator), SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE TaskState/Role enums, SendMessageRequest params wrapping, response wrapping ({task:...}, {tasks:...}). All 11 operations verified with spec JSON examples. 40 tests pass (3 unit + 14 conformance + 5 integration + 18 spec conformance). Official A2A SDKs (Python, Go, JS, Java, .NET, Rust) exist but all use HTTP/gRPC/JSON-RPC transports — none support QUIC, so live SDK interop was not feasible. The A2A TCK (a2a-tck) also operates over HTTP. Strategy B (spec examples) was used instead, verifying byte-for-byte payload preservation and correct method dispatch against exact v1.0 spec JSON.

details.notes: Found 6 official A2A SDKs (Python a2a-sdk v1.1.0, Go a2a-go v2.0.0, JS, Java, .NET, Rust) + TCK at a2aproject/a2a-tck. All use HTTP/gRPC/JSON-RPC transports, none support QUIC.
Strategy B (spec examples) chosen — live SDK interop not feasible without custom QUIC transport adapter. TCK operates over HTTP only.

Updated types.rs to A2A v1.0: Part flat OneOf (no kind), TaskState SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE (9 states), Role enum (3 values), Message with extensions/referenceTaskIds, Task.contextId optional, AgentInterface for binding declaration, SendMessageResponse/ListTasksResponse wrappers.
Updated server.rs dispatch: SendMessage/SendStreamingMessage extract params.message, responses wrapped in {task:...} and {tasks:...} per v1.0 §9.4.
SendMessage with ROLE_USER, text part, messageId — response wraps Task in {task:...} with TASK_STATE_COMPLETED, artifact with flat part (no kind)
SendStreamingMessage returns 3 events: WORKING status, artifact update, COMPLETED status with final:true
TASK_STATE_INPUT_REQUIRED serializes correctly as SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE
ListTasks with contextId/status/pageSize params, response wraps in {tasks:...], totalSize, pageSize, nextPageToken}
CreateTaskPushNotificationConfig with url/token/authentication.schemes — config round-trips correctly
Part with raw (base64) and url fields, mediaType — no kind discriminator
Part with structured data field — no kind discriminator
GetTask JSON-RPC with id + historyLength, response wraps Task in {task:...}
ListTasks JSON-RPC with status=TASK_STATE_WORKING, pageSize, pageToken
CancelTask JSON-RPC, response Task with TASK_STATE_CANCELED
SubscribeToTask JSON-RPC dispatches correctly
GetExtendedAgentCard returns AgentCard with supportedInterfaces declaring AAFP binding URI
All 9 A2A-specific error codes (-32001 to -32009) + 4 JSON-RPC standard codes verified
All JSON fields use camelCase (messageId, contextId, taskId, etc.) per §5.5
All 9 TaskState values serialize/deserialize as SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE: UNSPECIFIED, SUBMITTED, WORKING, COMPLETED, FAILED, CANCELED, INPUT_REQUIRED, REJECTED, AUTH_REQUIRED
All 3 Role values: ROLE_UNSPECIFIED, ROLE_USER, ROLE_AGENT
Spec-conformant JSON-RPC message preserves all fields through serialize/deserialize round-trip
5 integration tests pass: send_message, get/list/cancel, streaming, error_mapping, graceful_close — all over real QUIC with AAFP handshake
